title: Custom AI vs Microsoft Copilot for Universities
directAnswer: Microsoft Copilot for Education provides AI features within the M365 suite — document drafting, meeting summaries, SharePoint search. A custom AI system trained on institutional data provides enrollment intelligence, staff knowledge retrieval, and student service automation calibrated to the institution's specific policies and historical data. Copilot is appropriate for staff productivity augmentation within M365. Custom AI is right when the institution needs AI that knows its specific policies, student population, and operational patterns.
